+++
title = "Bringing the blog home"
date = 2026-06-05
draft = false
summary = "Why I'm moving my writing off Medium and onto mikerenoe.com — and how the new setup works."
canonicalURL = ""
+++

For years my writing lived on Medium. It's a fine place to read, but the
work — and the SEO that comes with it — belonged to someone else's domain.
So I've brought the blog home.

From now on, posts are written in Markdown and published here first, at
**mikerenoe.com/blog**. Everything is generated by [Hugo](https://gohugo.io)
and deployed alongside the rest of the site on Vercel, so the blog shares the
same look and feel you're seeing right now.

There's an [RSS feed](/feed.xml) too. When I cross-post to Medium or dev.to,
those copies point their canonical URL back here — so this page stays the
original, and the search-engine credit stays with the site.

More soon.
